message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 236 close main.rs storage surface — all storage reads cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

**MILESTONE**: closes the StorageHandle surface migration in
frankenterm/main.rs. All ambient `storage.get_*()` calls now use
cx-first entry points.

6 sites migrated this tick:
1. L24947 workflow CLI get_workflow: `get_workflow_with_cx(&storage_cx, &execution_id)`
2. L27025 plan-commit send_text get_pane: `get_pane_with_cx(&storage_cx, pane_id)`
3. L27312 plan-commit workflow_run get_pane: `get_pane_with_cx(&storage_cx, pane_id)`
4. L27965 ft audit command get_audit_actions: `get_audit_actions_with_cx(&storage_cx, query)`
5. L32268 ft why --decision-id: `get_audit_actions_with_cx(&storage_cx, query)`
6. L32317 ft why history: `get_audit_actions_with_cx(&storage_cx, query)`

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern. Uses
locally-scoped `storage_cx` binding to avoid shadowing other `cx`
bindings in nearby scope.

Verification:
- `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
- `grep -n 'storage\.get_workflow(\|storage\.get_pane(\|storage\.get_audit_actions('`
  returns ZERO hits in main.rs (was 11 at tick 235 start)

## main.rs storage surface complete: 11/11 sites cx-first

Tick-level breakdown (ticks 235-236):
- Tick 235: 5 sites (read/search policy auth, workflow context,
  robot workflow status pane + exec_id + step_logs)
- Tick 236: 6 sites (this tick)

## Cumulative main.rs cross-crate migration through tick 236

| Surface | Sites | Ticks |
|---------|-------|-------|
| WorkflowRunner | 6 | 224/226 |
| NotificationPipeline | 1 | 225 |
| IpcClient | 7 | 227/228 |
| CassClient | 3 | 227/229 |
| WeztermInterface | 28 | 230-234 |
| StorageHandle | 11 | 235-236 |
| **Total** | **56** | 224-236 |

The ft-xbnl0.2.3 cx-first chain now reaches end-to-end from the
CLI layer (main.rs) through all major dispatch surfaces in
frankenterm-core. 50 ticks this session: 187-236.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
